Body.Content:
Remove the 22-inch size limit and modernize Access forms and reports work well on large format monitors and provide responsive behavior for different form factors.

GA date: June CY2026

Preview date: December CY2025
Body.Markdown:
Remove the 22-inch size limit and modernize Access forms and reports work well on large format monitors and provide responsive behavior for different form factors.

GA date: June CY2026

Preview date: December CY2025

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: Remove the 22-inch size limit and modernize Access forms and reports work well on large format monitors and provide responsive behavior for different form factors.

message.Title: Access: Modernize Access Forms and Reports to work well on Large Format Monitors

Body.Content:
With the removal of the 22-inch limit, your apps can now take full advantage of today’s larger monitors. You can display more data, create flexible layouts, and deliver a better experience on wide and high-resolution screens.

GA date: June CY2026

Preview date: June CY2026

message.Title: Access: Design Access forms and reports without 22-inch size constraints
